Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('name:',p.name\); console.log\('deps keys:',Object.keys\(p.dependencies||{}\).length\); console.log\('has next:',!!p.dependencies?.next\); console.log\('has vitest:',!!p.devDependencies?.vitest\); console.log\('has mediapipe tasks-vision:',!!p.dependencies?.['@mediapipe/tasks-vision']\); console.log\('has pixi:',!!p.dependencies?.['pixi.js']\); console.log\('has zod:',!!p.dependencies?.zod\); console.log\('has playwright:',!!p.devDependencies?.['@playwright/test']\);")

Bash(node -e "const e = require\('essentia.js'\); const es = new e.Essentia\(e.EssentiaWASM\); console.log\('version:', es.version\); console.log\('RhythmExtractor2013 exists:', typeof es.RhythmExtractor2013 === 'function'\);")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('audio-decode'\); console.log\(typeof d, Object.keys\(d||{}\).slice\(0,10\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('audio-decode'\).default; const fs=require\('fs'\); d\(fs.readFileSync\('public/bgm/atlasaudio-jazz-490623.mp3'\)\).then\(a => { console.log\('proto keys:', Object.keys\(a\)\); console.log\('constructor:', a.constructor?.name\); console.log\('numChannels:', a.numberOfChannels, 'sr:', a.sampleRate, 'length:', a.length\); console.log\('has _data:', !!a._data, '_channelData:', !!a._channelData\); if \(a._channelData\) console.log\('ch0 len:', a._channelData[0]?.length\); }\);")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'total: {len\(d\)}'\); [print\(f\\"{t['id']}  [{t['genre']:10}]  {t['name']}\\"\) for t in d]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; [print\(t['id'],'|',t['genre'],'|',t['name']\) for t in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('TOTAL:',len\(d\)\); [print\(t['id'],'|',t['genre'],'|',t['name']\) for t in d]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['hits'][0]; print\('tags:',d['tags']\); print\('user:',d['user']\); print\('url:',d['webformatURL']\)")
